sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event DateTime, description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (toDateTime('2020-01-01 00:00:00'), 'New Year Celebration');
SELECT addTupleOfIntervals(toDateTime('2020-01-01 00:00:00'), (INTERVAL 7 DAY, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS adjusted_date;
UPDATE test_dates SET event = addTupleOfIntervals(event, (INTERVAL 2 DAY, INTERVAL 6 MONTH)) WHERE description = 'New Year Celebration';
SELECT description, addTupleOfIntervals(event, (INTERVAL 15 DAY, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) AS future_event FROM test_dates;
